query: SELECT l.name, j.phone, j.smsNumber, j.status, j.sentAt, j.errorMessage FROM sms_jobs j JOIN calculator_leads l ON j.leadId = l.id WHERE l.name IN ('Lucy', 'Caitlin', 'Ruby Frangiosa') ORDER BY l.name, j.smsNumber;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Fj69ra1SNGW4TB.root --database TeiTyUgvfabHNSBnznn263 --execute SELECT l.name, j.phone, j.smsNumber, j.status, j.sentAt, j.errorMessage FROM sms_jobs j JOIN calculator_leads l ON j.leadId = l.id WHERE l.name IN ('Lucy', 'Caitlin', 'Ruby Frangiosa') ORDER BY l.name, j.smsNumber;
